'''Graven R'ube''' was a [[Y'bith/Legends|Y'bith]] and a patron at [[Chalmun's Spaceport Cantina/Legends|Chalmun's Cantina]]. R'ube was present in the cantina around [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], when the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] curfew went into effect. The Y'bith left the establishment during [[Ackmena/Legends|Ackmena's]] final performance of [[Goodnight, But Not Goodbye/Legends|''Goodnight, But Not Goodbye'']], together with a drunken [[Caldera Righim]].

==Behind the scenes==
This alien's face was made from a modified [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] mask. The name, which was first revealed in the blog ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special Cantina: Who's Who]]'', is an anagram of [[Evan Burger]], author of the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' entry on the [[Y'bith/Legends|Y'bith]].
